title: GRUFF trust routing decision v1
description: Routing decision written by proxy-server or gruff CLI into ~/.gruff/trust.sqlite routing_decisions table.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the routing decision

tool.description: MCP tool name that was being dispatched

decision.description: Routing outcome: school=full scope, practice=harness sandbox, hold=rejected

reason.description: Human-readable explanation (score basis, override provenance, etc.)

decided_by.description: Component that made the decision (e.g. proxy-server, scorer, gruff-cli)
